name: TREK
description: TREK is a self-hosted, real-time collaborative travel planner with interactive maps, budgets, packing lists, weather forecasts, PWA support, and multi-user collaboration via WebSocket.

notes.text: A default admin account is seeded during setup with the email admin@trek.local.
ENCRYPTION_KEY is auto-generated during setup and stored in `/opt/trek/server/.env`.
Set APP_URL in `/opt/trek/server/.env` if you plan to use OIDC or email-based features.
